TransDigm appoints Irina Krasik to Board
data.description:
TransDigm appointed Irina Krasik to its Board of Directors, effective July 22, 2026.

IndividualIrina Krasik
RoleDirector
Type of ChangeAppointed
Effective DateJuly 22, 2026
ReasonNot disclosed
Replacement InfoNot disclosed
Background DetailsManaging Director at Stellex Capital Management since 2021; former Principal at Bregal Investments; >8 years at The Wicks Group; roles at The Carlyle Group and Merrill Lynch; MBA Harvard Business School; B.S. Finance Rutgers University
Board/Committee Role ChangesNot appointed to any Board committees

Original SEC Filing: TransDigm Group INC [ TDG ] - 8-K - Jul. 24, 2026

Disclaimer
This is an AI-powered summary. It may contain inaccuracies. Consider verifying important information with the source. Please note this summary is solely based on documents filed with the SEC.

data.title: REG - Societe Generale SA IP Group PLC - Form 8.3 - IP Group plc
data.description:
RNS Number : 8238N Societe Generale SA 24 July 2026  

FORM 8.3

PUBLIC OPENING POSITION DISCLOSURE/DEALING DISCLOSURE BY

A PERSON WITH INTERESTS IN RELEVANT SECURITIES REPRESENTING 1% OR MORE

Rule 8.3 of the Takeover Code (the "Code")

1.         KEY INFORMATION

(a)  Full name of discloser:

SOCIETE GENERALE SA

(b)  Owner or controller of interests and short positions disclosed, if different from 1(a):

The naming of nominee or vehicle companies is insufficient.  For a trust, the trustee(s), settlor and beneficiaries must be named.

(c)  Name of offeror/offeree in relation to whose relevant securities this form relates:

Use a separate form for each offeror/offeree

IP Group plc

(d)  If an exempt fund manager connected with an offeror/offeree, state this and specify identity of offeror/offeree:

(e)  Date position held/dealing undertaken:

For an opening position disclosure, state the latest practicable date prior to the disclosure

23/07/2026

(f)   In addition to the company in 1(c) above, is the discloser making disclosures in respect of any other party to the offer?

If it is a cash offer or possible cash offer, state "N/A"

N/A

2.         POSITIONS OF THE PERSON MAKING THE DISCLOSURE

If there are positions or rights to subscribe to disclose in more than one class of relevant securities of the offeror or offeree named in 1(c), copy table 2(a) or (b) (as appropriate) for each additional class of relevant security.

  • Details, including nature of the rights concerned and relevant percentages:

3.         DEALINGS (IF ANY) BY THE PERSON MAKING THE DISCLOSURE

Where there have been dealings in more than one class of relevant securities of the offeror or offeree named in 1(c), copy table 3(a), (b), (c) or (d) (as appropriate) for each additional class of relevant security dealt in.

  • Number of reference securities

    GBP

(c)        Stock-settled derivative transactions (including options)

(i)         Writing, selling, purchasing or varying

  • Class of relevant security

  • Writing, purchasing, selling, varying etc.

  • Number of securities to which option relates

  • Number of securities

  • Exercise price per unit

(d)        Other dealings (including subscribing for new securities)

  • Class of relevant security

    e.g. subscription, conversion

  • Details

  • Price per unit (if applicable)

4.         OTHER INFORMATION

(a)        Indemnity and other dealing arrangements

  • Details of any indemnity or option arrangement, or any agreement or understanding, formal or informal, relating to relevant securities which may be an inducement to deal or refrain from dealing entered into by the person making the disclosure and any party to the offer or any person acting in concert with a party to the offer:

    Irrevocable commitments and letters of intent should not be included.  If there are no such agreements, arrangements or understandings, state "none"

  • None

(b)        Agreements, arrangements or understandings relating to options or derivatives

  • Details of any agreement, arrangement or understanding, formal or informal, between the person making the disclosure and any other person relating to:

    (i)  the voting rights of any relevant securities under any option; or

    (ii) the voting rights or future acquisition or disposal of any relevant securities to which any derivative is referenced:

    If there are no such agreements, arrangements or understandings, state "none"

  • None

(c)        Attachments

  • Is a Supplemental Form 8 (Open Positions) attached?

  • NO

24/07/2026

Contact name:

Paul Jenkins

+44 20 7676 6969

The Panel's Market Surveillance Unit is available for consultation in relation to the Code's disclosure requirements on +44 (0)20 7638 0129.

IEX: FY26 PAT grew 17% YoY to INR 493 Cr, with strong revenue and expanding market participation
data.description:
FY26 saw robust growth with consolidated PAT at INR 493 Cr and operating revenue up 15% YoY. Market reforms, new products, and digital innovation are driving deeper participation, while regulatory changes and market coupling present key risks.

Original document: Indian Energy Exchange Ltd. [IEX] Slides Release — Jul. 24 2026

CHTR: Revenue and net income declined, but mobile growth and network investments remained strong
data.description:
Revenue declined 1.7% year-over-year to $13.5 billion, with net income at $1.3 billion and Adjusted EBITDA down 4.3%. Mobile lines grew strongly, while Internet and video customers declined. Capital expenditures remained flat, and significant investments were made in network evolution and rural expansion.

Original document: Charter Communications, Inc. [CHTR] SEC 8-K Current Report — Jul. 24 2026

Disclaimer
This is an AI-generated summary and may contain inaccuracies. Please verify any important information with the original source.

data.title: VZ: Record adjusted EBITDA and raised 2026 outlook highlight robust operational momentum
data.description:
Strong wireless and broadband growth drove a 2.8% rise in service revenue and record adjusted EBITDA, with improved free cash flow and raised 2026 guidance. Updated outlook reflects operational momentum and the integration of a major acquisition.

Original document: Verizon Communications Inc. [VZ] Slides Release — Jul. 24 2026

AIY: Record AUA and profit growth drive higher dividends and strong outlook for scalable global expansion
data.description:
Strong YoY growth in revenue (+34.8%) and net profit (+35.0%) was driven by record AUA, robust segment performance, and digital banking expansion. Dividend guidance was raised, and AI adoption is expected to support future margin improvements.

Original document: iFAST Corporation Ltd [AIY] Slides Release — Jul. 27 2026

data.title: AIY: Record AUA and strong profit growth in 1H26 drive higher dividends and positive outlook
data.description:
Revenue and net profit saw robust YoY growth in 2Q26 and 1H26, driven by record AUA, strong net inflows, and expansion in core wealth management and ePension divisions. Management raised dividend guidance and expects continued healthy growth, targeting $100 billion AUA by 2030.

Original document: iFAST Corporation Ltd [AIY] Interim report — Jul. 27 2026

Disclaimer
This is an AI-generated summary and may contain inaccuracies. Please verify any important information with the original source.

REG - Oracle Power PLC - Result of AGM
data.description:
RNS Number : 8215N Oracle Power PLC 24 July 2026  

24 July 2026

Oracle Power PLC

("Oracle" or the "Company")

Result of AGM

Oracle Power PLC (AIM: ORCP), an international project developer, is pleased to announce that the resolutions proposed at its Annual General Meeting ("AGM") held earlier today, as set out in the formal Notice of Annual General Meeting dated 24 June 2026, were all duly approved by shareholders.

​
